description_long: This is a single bed frame constructed from dark wood, featuring a slatted headboard and footboard with rectangular cutouts. The frame is rectangular and low to the ground, with sturdy side rails and no visible under-bed storage. The surface where a mattress would rest is flat and solid, with three evenly spaced support slats running lengthwise. The design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a matte finish. There is no mattress or bedding present, leaving the wooden support surface exposed. The overall appearance is robust and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark wooden single bed frame with slatted headboard and footboard, featuring a minimalist, sturdy design and no visible mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the footboard with rectangular cutouts and the solid side rails.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bed frame, the three support slats, and both headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the headboard with vertical slats and the solid frame construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the bed's length and support slats.
